features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.desc: Choose 3 invocations for ongoing magical abilities.

features.name: Magical Cunning
features.desc: When you have no Pact Magic slots, you can regain half your slots. 1/long rest.

features.name: Pact Boon
features.desc: Choose a Pact Boon: Blade, Chain, or Tome.

features.name: Contact Patron
features.desc: Cast Contact Other Plane to contact patron without expending a slot. 1/long rest.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (6th)
features.desc: Choose one 6th-level spell. Cast it once per long rest without a slot.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (7th)
features.desc: Choose one 7th-level spell. Cast it once per long rest without a slot.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (8th)
features.desc: Choose one 8th-level spell. Cast it once per long rest without a slot.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (9th)
features.desc: Choose one 9th-level spell. Cast it once per long rest without a slot.

features.name: Epic Boon
features.desc: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat of your choice.

features.name: Eldritch Master
features.desc: Spend 1 minute to regain all Pact Magic spell slots. 1/long rest.
